bodyText:

HEADING2: Company Registration Consultant in Chhattisgarh
Virtual Auditor provides company registration consultant across Chhattisgarh. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Chhattisgarh with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Mumbai (Chhattisgarh) handles company registrations and filings for Chhattisgarh. Stamp duty: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: Which entity type is best for my business?
faqs.a: Pvt Ltd for funding, LLP for professionals, OPC for solo entrepreneurs, Section 8 for non-profit. We advise based on your specific goals.

faqs.q: What is the cheapest company to register?
faqs.a: Sole proprietorship (₹0 registration fee) or LLP (from ₹5,999). Pvt Ltd from ₹8,999 all-inclusive.

faqs.q: Can NRIs register a company in India?
faqs.a: Yes. NRIs can be directors and shareholders. At least one director must be an Indian resident (182+ days in India).

faqs.q: Do you provide company registration services in Chhattisgarh?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Chhattisgarh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Chhattisgarh?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Chhattisgarh fall under ROC Mumbai (Chhattisgarh). Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Chhattisgarh-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Chhattisgarh?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Chhattisgarh: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
